title: Urban Elegance — Fashion Editorial
summary: A high-fashion editorial shoot blending modern urban architecture with luxury couture styling and cinematic lighting.

seo.metaTitle: Urban Elegance Fashion Editorial | PixelRoot Studio
seo.metaDescription: High-fashion editorial photography blending urban architecture with luxury couture styling.

body: This editorial was conceived as a dialogue between structure and softness — sharp city lines meeting fluid fabric and deliberate poses.
Shot across three locations in Dhaka's modern business district, each frame was lit to emphasise texture, silhouette, and the interplay of warm amber tones against cool concrete.
The result is a portfolio of images that feel both editorial and timeless — crafted for a luxury fashion brand seeking a modern urban identity.

gallery.caption: Golden hour on the rooftop terrace

title: Garden Romance — Wedding Collection
summary: An intimate garden wedding captured with documentary sensitivity and cinematic colour grading for timeless keepsakes.

seo.metaDescription: Intimate garden wedding photography with documentary sensitivity and cinematic colour.

body: From the first look beneath the banyan trees to the final dance under string lights, every moment of this celebration was documented with an unobtrusive, story-driven approach.
We prioritised authentic emotion over posed perfection — allowing the couple's natural connection to guide the narrative of the day.
The final gallery delivers a cohesive visual story: warm, romantic, and designed to be treasured for generations.

gallery.caption: First look beneath the garden canopy

title: Summit Corporate — Brand Campaign
summary: A corporate brand photography campaign for a leading technology firm, showcasing leadership, culture, and workplace excellence.

seo.metaTitle: Summit Corporate Brand Campaign | PixelRoot Studio
seo.metaDescription: Corporate brand photography showcasing leadership, culture, and workplace excellence.

body: Summit Technologies needed a visual identity refresh for their annual report, website, and social channels — imagery that communicates innovation, trust, and human connection.
Over two days on location, we photographed executive portraits, team collaborations, and candid workplace moments using a clean, modern lighting setup.
The delivered assets gave the brand a cohesive, premium visual language across all touchpoints.

title: Artisan Collection — Product Photography
summary: Commercial product photography for a luxury skincare line, featuring meticulous lighting and refined post-production.

seo.metaDescription: Luxury skincare product photography with meticulous lighting and refined post-production.

body: Each product in the Artisan Skincare line was photographed individually with a consistent lighting rig designed to highlight glass textures, label typography, and liquid clarity.
Multiple angles and lifestyle compositions were created for e-commerce, packaging, and digital advertising use.
Post-production focused on colour accuracy and subtle enhancement — ensuring the products looked as premium in print as they do in person.
